[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Discrete Mathematics]]Discrete mathematics is a class I'm taking

== First midtern content ==

* [[Propositional logic]]
* [[Predicate logic]]
* [[Euclidean algorithm]]

== Second midterm content ==
* [[Set theory]]
** [[Double containment]] (needs a lot of work) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ARZqP6CkCHU
* [[Permutations]]
* [[Recurrence Relations]]

== Third midterm content ==

* [[Euler's Formula]] only formula I need to remember

* [[Relations]]
* [[Functions]]
* [[Graph Theory]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
